class DataTransformer:
    def transform(self, value):
        return value.strip()


class Normalizer:
    def __init__(self):
        self._transformer = DataTransformer()

    def normalize(self, value):
        return self._transformer.transform(value)


class Processor:
    def __init__(self):
        self._normalizer = Normalizer()

    def process(self, value):
        return self._normalizer.normalize(value)


class Pipeline:
    def __init__(self):
        self._processor = Processor()

    def run(self, value):
        return self._processor.process(value)


class Service:
    def __init__(self):
        self._pipeline = Pipeline()

    def execute(self, value):
        return self._pipeline.run(value)


def handle_request(value):
    svc = Service()
    return svc.execute(value)
